query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 OR monthlyCost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cost FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND serviceType = 'Internet';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 OR monthlyCost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cost FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND serviceType = 'Internet';
